nodes.name: Schedule — Mon, Wed, Fri 9am
nodes.notes: Checks invoice status three times per week — enough to stay on top without being annoying

nodes.name: HoneyBook — Get Outstanding Invoices
nodes.notes: HoneyBook API key found in: Account Settings > Integrations > API
